series_metadata.series_description: All informal and/or temporary messages, notes, and correspondence, including email, telephone voice messages, post-it-notes, instant messages, text messages, social media posts, shared agency calendars, and any documents that serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of verbal communication.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
